name: Maresin 1 aged mouse tibial fracture healing study
summary: Aged 24-month-old mice underwent tibial fracture surgery and received vehicle or Maresin 1 beginning 3 days after injury, with inflammatory, callus, bone-deposition, and mechanical repair endpoints.
model_system: Aged 24-month-old mice after tibial fracture surgery, plus aged bone marrow-derived macrophage and stromal-cell culture assays
